_meta.description: Reference framework for translating climate impact into project economics (NPV/IRR/DSCR) and a Climate Risk Premium (CRP). Every threshold/spread carries a citable source; financing defaults flagged 'model assumption' are starting points the user overrides per project/asset. The CRP is a counterfactual: the increase in credit spread / WACC from the no-climate baseline to the climate-stressed cashflow.
_meta.provenance: DSCR→rating: Moody's Global Infrastructure Finance (2021) + S&P Project Finance Criteria (2022). Rating→spread: Bloomberg US Corporate Bond Index 2020–2024 average (distressed levels for CC/C/D). Aligned with PLANiT crp-core so the two tools price consistently.
